私たちが所属する、この巨大船団の
正式な名称は、何でしょうか？
オラクル
ラグオル
グラール

正解です。
惑星間を自由に旅する巨大な船団。
それを「オラクル」と呼びます。

不正解です。
正しくは、「オラクル」。
惑星間を自由に旅する巨大な船団です。

不正解です。
正しくは、「オラクル」。
惑星間を自由に旅する巨大な船団です。

What is the official name of the giant
fleet of which we are a part?
Oraculo
ragol
Grahl

Correct.
Our giant interplanetary fleet is
known as "Oracle."

Incorrect.
The correct answer is "Oracle."
A giant fleet that flies freely between planets.

Incorrect.
The correct answer is "Oracle."

Ahora bien, otra pregunta relacionada con Oracle.

One component of Oracle is a group that
heads down to planets to conduct
investigations and other missions.

You're also a member of this survey group,
<%me>.
What is the official name of the group?
los guardianes
ARCAS
Los cazadores

Incorrect.
The correct answer is "ARKS."

We travel to uncharted planets primarily to
conduct investigations and interact with
native peoples.

However, the ultimate purpose of ARKS
does not stop with simple investigation...

もう一つの目的。

そう、正解です。
アークスの敵、その名は「ダーカー」。
宇宙にはびこる、闇そのものです。

アークスの目的は惑星の調査。
そして、もう一つの目的が
ダーカーの殲滅です。

ダーカーはありとあらゆるものを侵食し
ダーカーへと変化させます。
その対処も、アークスの仕事です。

各惑星の原生種と言えども
それは例外ではありません。
やらなければ、やられるだけです。

Note that also ARKS has another
objective assigned to it.

That objective is to root out and eliminate the
all sources of evil throughout the universe.

in the known universe,
that corrupts everything it gets near?
Falspawn
SEMILLA
Astarte

Yes, that's correct. The enemy of ARKS
are known as "Falspawn." They are a dark
pestilence that spreads throughout space.

One of the missions of ARKS is planetary
investigation. Another goal is the
extermination of the Falspawn.

Falspawn corrupt everything they touch,
turning them into more Falspawn.
Dealing with them is one of your duties.

Corrupted sylvants found on different
planets are no exception. If you don't take
them out, they will take you out.

Incorrect. The name of the enemy of ARKS
is "Falspawn." They are a dark plague that
spreads throughout space.
